    • Class de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Namespace

      class Namespace extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      7510655524858729144L

      • Serialized Fields

        • parent
          Namespace<E extends Named> parent
          The fall-back namespace for symbols not present in this Namespace.
        • sealed
          boolean sealed
          A namespace can be made immutable, this is called "sealing". This flag indicates whether this namespace has been sealed or not.
        • symbols
          Map<Name,E extends Named> symbols
          The map that maps a name to a symbols of that name if it is defined in this Namespace.

  • Package de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava

    • Exception de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava.ParseException

      class ParseException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentToken
          Token currentToken
          This is the last token that has been consumed successfully. If this object has been created due to a parse error, the token followng this token will (therefore) be the first error token.
        • eol
          String eol
          The end of line string for this machine.
        • expectedTokenSequences
          int[][] expectedTokenSequences
          Each entry in this array is an array of integers. Each array of integers represents a sequence of tokens (by their ordinal values) that is expected at this point of the parse.
        • specialConstructor
          boolean specialConstructor
          This variable determines which constructor was used to create this object and thereby affects the semantics of the "getMessage" method (see below).
        • tokenImage
          String[] tokenImage
          This is a reference to the "tokenImage" array of the generated parser within which the parse error occurred. This array is defined in the generated ...Constants interface.

    • Error de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava.TokenMgrError

      class TokenMgrError extends Error implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • errorCode
          int errorCode
          Indicates the reason why the exception is thrown. It will have one of the above 4 values.

  • Package de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava

    • Exception de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava.ParseException

      class ParseException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentToken
          Token currentToken
          This is the last token that has been consumed successfully. If this object has been created due to a parse error, the token followng this token will (therefore) be the first error token.
        • eol
          String eol
          The end of line string for this machine.
        • expectedTokenSequences
          int[][] expectedTokenSequences
          Each entry in this array is an array of integers. Each array of integers represents a sequence of tokens (by their ordinal values) that is expected at this point of the parse.
        • specialConstructor
          boolean specialConstructor
          This variable determines which constructor was used to create this object and thereby affects the semantics of the "getMessage" method (see below).
        • tokenImage
          String[] tokenImage
          This is a reference to the "tokenImage" array of the generated parser within which the parse error occurred. This array is defined in the generated ...Constants interface.

      class TokenMgrError extends Error implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

          Indicates the reason why the exception is thrown. It will have one of the above 4 values.

          Text panel showing slicing progress in tabular form.
        • mediator
          KeYMediator mediator
          Active KeY mediator.
        • sliceButton
          Runnable sliceButton
          Function that slices the currently loaded proof.
        • slicedAway
          Map<String,Integer> slicedAway
          Stores for all slices in total: rule name -> number of times sliced away.
        • tableRows
          Collection<Collection<String>> tableRows

        • worker
          org.key_project.slicing.ui.SliceToFixedPointWorker worker

    • Class org.key_project.slicing.ui.SlicingLeftPanel

      class SlicingLeftPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • abbreviateFormulas
          JCheckBox abbreviateFormulas
          Checkbox to abbreviate formulas in DOT output.
        • buttonSystemGC
          JButton buttonSystemGC
          If SlicingLeftPanel.ENABLE_DEBUGGING_UI is true: a button that will call the garbage collector
        • doDeduplicateRuleApps
          JCheckBox doDeduplicateRuleApps
          Checkbox to enable rule de-duplication.
        • doDependencyAnalysis
          JCheckBox doDependencyAnalysis
          Checkbox to enable the dependency analysis algorithm.
        • dotExport
          JButton dotExport
          "Export as DOT" button.
        • graphEdges
          JLabel graphEdges
          Label indicating the number of dependency graph edges.
          See Also:
          • DependencyGraph
        • graphEdgesNr
          int graphEdgesNr
          Number of edges in the dependency graph.
        • graphNodes
          JLabel graphNodes
          Label indicating the number of dependency graph nodes.
          See Also:
          • DependencyGraph
        • graphNodesNr
          int graphNodesNr
          Number of nodes in the dependency graph.
        • memoryStats
          JLabel memoryStats
          Label showing current usage of the Java heap.
        • runAnalysis
          JButton runAnalysis
          "Run analysis" button.
        • showGraphRendering
          JButton showGraphRendering
          "Show rendering of graph" button.
        • showRuleStatistics
          JButton showRuleStatistics
          "Show rule statistics" button.
        • sliceProof
          JButton sliceProof
          "Slice proof" button.
        • sliceProofFixedPoint
          JButton sliceProofFixedPoint
          "Slice proof to fixed point" button.
        • timings
          JPanel timings
          Panel showing execution time of the algorithm.
        • totalBranches
          JLabel totalBranches
          Label showing total number of branches in the analyzed proof.
        • totalSteps
          JLabel totalSteps
          Label showing total number of steps in the analyzed proof.
        • updateGraphLabels
          boolean updateGraphLabels
          Indicates whether graph statistics (SlicingLeftPanel.graphNodes, SlicingLeftPanel.graphEdges) need to be updated based on SlicingLeftPanel.graphNodesNr and SlicingLeftPanel.graphEdgesNr.
        • updateGraphLabelsTimer
          Timer updateGraphLabelsTimer
          Timer to regularly update dependency graph statistics when loading a proof.
        • usefulBranches
          JLabel usefulBranches
          Label showing number of useful branches as determined by the analysis.
        • usefulSteps
          JLabel usefulSteps
          Label showing number of useful steps as determined by the analysis.

          The (key, value) mapping last inserted into this map.

          Number of entries in the map. Equal to 1 + parent.size if entry is not null, parent.size otherwise.

          EnumConstructorReference ref
          a reference to the enum type. Note that this must always be set, even if no parantheses are present in the concrete syntax.

    • Class recoder.java.expression.Assignment

      class Assignment extends Operator implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • statementParent
          StatementContainer statementParent
          either statementParent or expressionParent is null, in case of ambiguities (e.g. Assignment as a parent), prefer an ExpressionContainer as parent. We could resolve these problems by introduction of an AssignmentContainer as supertype of StatementContainer and ExpressionContainer.

  • Package recoder.parser

    • Exception recoder.parser.ParseException

      class ParseException extends ParserException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentToken
          Token currentToken
          This is the last token that has been consumed successfully. If this object has been created due to a parse error, the token followng this token will (therefore) be the first error token.
        • eol
          String eol
          The end of line string for this machine.
        • expectedTokenSequences
          int[][] expectedTokenSequences
          Each entry in this array is an array of integers. Each array of integers represents a sequence of tokens (by their ordinal values) that is expected at this point of the parse.
        • specialConstructor
          boolean specialConstructor
          This variable determines which constructor was used to create this object and thereby affects the semantics of the "getMessage" method (see below).
        • tokenImage
          String[] tokenImage
          This is a reference to the "tokenImage" array of the generated parser within which the parse error occurred. This array is defined in the generated ...Constants interface.

    • Error recoder.parser.TokenMgrError

      class TokenMgrError extends Error implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • errorCode
          int errorCode
          Indicates the reason why the exception is thrown. It will have one of the above 4 values.
